hero.sub: Connecting qualified buyers with Brazilian suppliers through 30+ years of experience, rigorous compliance and world-class international documentation.
hero.ceo_trust: Osvaldo Matos de Melo Júnior — CEO & Founder · Personally handles every negotiation

presence.mission_text: To be the trusted bridge between Brazilian producers and international buyers, delivering operational excellence, rigorous documentation and real results in every international trade operation.
presence.vision_text: To become the most respected international trade company in Northeast Brazil, internationally recognized for the quality of its operations, commitment to transparency and network of verified partners.
presence.values_text: We operate with absolute integrity at every step. Rigorous compliance, direct relationships and full accountability for results — because every operation represents the reputation of decades built by a family.

about.headline: A family enterprise built on decades of international trust
about.body1: BM5 is an international trade company headquartered in Recife, Pernambuco — founded on values of commitment, professionalism and real results. We are a family-owned firm with direct owner involvement in every negotiation.
about.body2: With dedicated divisions for client relations, international marketing, legal, financial and administrative services, BM5 delivers bespoke solutions for the export and import of Brazilian agricultural commodities to the global market.
about.feature1_desc: Direct owner contact in every deal. Fast decisions and full accountability in every operation.
about.feature2_desc: Integrated divisions: client relations, international marketing, legal, financial and administrative.
about.feature3_desc: Accredited with major trading houses, mills, farms and quota holders to negotiate export orders worldwide.

products.headline: Brazilian Commodities of Excellence
products.sub: We operate across Brazil's leading agro and food commodities, connecting our certified producer network to qualified international buyers.
products.sugar_desc: Refined and raw sugar from Brazil's top mills, with certified ICUMSA documentation and full supply chain traceability.
products.soy_desc: Premium Brazilian soybeans with direct farm access in the Cerrado and Mato Grosso regions. Large-volume capabilities.
products.corn_desc: Brazilian export-grade corn with integrated logistics for loading at major national ports.
products.chicken_desc: MAPA-certified Brazilian poultry protein, including chicken paws for Asian and Middle Eastern markets.
products.others_contact: Contact us to verify availability and specifications

leadership.headline: Leadership forged by 30 years in the global marketplace
leadership.osvaldo_bio: A specialist in international trade, marketing and competitive intelligence with more than 30 years of experience. A native of Recife, Pernambuco, Osvaldo has built an executive career spanning consulting for municipalities, governments, universities and public and private enterprises, presidential appointments, and a distinguished tenure at Embratur as its first Director of Marketing, Intelligence and Communications.
leadership.honor3: Pernambuco Police Military Merit Medal — Gold Class
leadership.honor4: Pernambuco Civil Police Merit Medal — Gold Class
leadership.honor5: Military Association of Pernambuco Merit Medal
leadership.family_desc: Maria Eduarda, Osvaldo Neto and Yuri are partners in BM5, ensuring continuity, commitment and long-term vision in all business operations.

compliance.headline: Structured operations with international rigor
compliance.sub: BM5 operates with buyer qualification protocols, robust international documentation and banking compliance that meets the standards demanded by the world's largest trading houses and financial institutions.
compliance.kyc_desc: Know Your Customer and Customer Information Sheet applied in every negotiation, ensuring full transparency and traceability of all parties involved.
compliance.docs_desc: We operate with ICPO, SPA, FCO, LOI, POF, verifiable BCL and the full documentary chain required to close large-scale international operations.
compliance.banking_desc: Support for operations involving MT199, MT799, MT760, MT700, SBLC and DLC — connecting buyers to suppliers with full settlement security.
compliance.network_desc: Accredited with major trading houses, mills, farms and quota holders. Direct access to verified suppliers with full documentation of origin.
compliance.flow1: 01. Receipt of LOI with product specifications
compliance.flow2: 02. Issuance of ICPO / FCO for formal qualification
compliance.flow3: 03. KYC / CIS due diligence on buyer
compliance.flow4: 04. SPA signing and financial instrument confirmation
compliance.flow6: 06. Issuance of shipping documents and SGS inspection
compliance.flow7: 07. Payment via MT700 / MT760 and final delivery

contact.headline: Initiate a Trade
contact.sub: Speak directly with BM5 owners. For serious operations, we require KYC documentation and LOI before advancing to a formal proposal.

shipDivider.headline_pre: From the Port of Santos to the world —

osvaldo.quote_text: Every international negotiation begins before the table — it begins with applied intelligence, the right network of contacts and the documentary rigor that ensures no operation fails for lack of preparation.
osvaldo.quote_body: In 38 years in the market — from the Federal Government to the private sector, from Recife to more than 15 countries — I have learned that the difference between closing or losing a contract always comes down to the level of preparation of the person leading the operation.

howWeOperate.headline: How We Operate
howWeOperate.subtitle: Standardized flow for Top-50 banks · 12-month rolling model · Guaranteed logistics SLA
howWeOperate.step01_body: Buyer submits ICPO with full KYC and verifiable BCL/RWA to the corporate compliance email.
howWeOperate.step02_body: Seller issues the Full Corporate Offer (FCO) with terms, price and product specifications.
howWeOperate.step03_body: Buyer countersigns the FCO and transmits Proof of Funds (POF) via MT799 bank-to-bank.
howWeOperate.step04_body: Seller issues preliminary SPA. Buyer reviews, signs and sends the SBLC verbiage for review at the seller's bank.
howWeOperate.step05_body: Seller returns the signed final SPA. After draft approval, SBLC must be issued within 15 days.
howWeOperate.step06_body: Buyer sends MT760 verbiage. Seller accepts and transmits POP bank-to-bank. With validated POP, buyer issues operative SBLC.
howWeOperate.step07_body: Buyer forwards copies of all SWIFTs to the seller's bank for verification and validation.
howWeOperate.step08_body: Seller issues Proforma Invoice; buyer reviews and signs, formalizing the shipment terms.
howWeOperate.step09_body: 2% PB issued by the seller within 10 days of financial instrument activation.
howWeOperate.step10_body: Original shipping documents are sent to the buyer's bank, which releases the MT103. The cycle repeats with each shipment.
howWeOperate.guarantee3: 1 month of face value in security
howWeOperate.guarantee5: First delivery in 30–45 days after SBLC activation
howWeOperate.compliance_title: Veracity Clause — Mandatory in All Operations
howWeOperate.compliance_body: All negotiations brokered by BM5 require a declaration of veracity under full civil and criminal liability. Seller must hold direct control or formal authorization over the product (POP, CIS, certificates). Buyer must present legitimate proof of funds (BCL, RWA, POF). False documentation or simulated financial capacity will result in immediate exclusion from the operation and reporting to the competent authorities.
